content.en:
Ye Tian urged the Black Mist Stone as the Moon Realm Lord said, allowing the power of the Black Mist Stone to form a thin layer of Black Mist Stone Clothing, enveloping his whole body.

Swish!

He turned into a ray of light and entered the area of black mist.

After coming in, the power of the black mist kept attacking Ye Tian, but they were all resisted by the power of the black mist stone, saving him from harm.

Soon, he entered the core of this area and sensed other extradimensional realms.

These extra-dimensional realms of the second realm also possess black mist stones, and their cultivation is almost always the existence of the pinnacle of the second realm.

These second realm extra-dimensional realms also sensed Ye Tian's arrival, but they ignored it, and still wholeheartedly comprehended the extradimensional rules.

I saw that not far away, there was a black mist stone statue, and it was this black mist stone statue that could assist many extra-dimensional realms to comprehend the extra-dimensional rules.

"A black mist stone statue!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

"Is there no extradimensional realm that can take this black mist stone statue?"

Ye Tian asked the Lord of the Moon Realm.

"No!" the Moon Realm Lord shook his head, "I also wanted to take this black mist stone statue at the beginning, but I couldn't touch it!"

"Untouchable?"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

"Yes, you can try it, and you'll find out!"

The Lord of the Moon Realm didn't say much.

Ye Tian flew over and reached out to touch the black mist stone statue.

As a result, his arm passed through the Black Mist Stone Statue 237, as if the Black Mist Stone was a phantom.

He used will, extradimensional rules and other means to touch, but he still couldn't touch it.

"What a magical black mist stone statue!"

Ye Tian knew that he couldn't touch the black mist stone statue, so he felt at ease.

Rumble!!!!!

With the help of the Black Mist Stone Statue Enlightenment, an astonishing effect appeared, which was many times clearer than the usual comprehension of the extradimensional rules.

The key is that he can also use the multi-dimensional essence to comprehend the extradimensional rules, and the effect will be even better.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately shielded the perception of the outside world, and even blocked the perception in the body, took out the multi-dimensional essence, and directly refined it.

The multi-dimensional essence, coupled with the black mist stone statue, after the effect is superimposed, it is the real horror.

Time passed slowly, and a period of time passed.

During this period, the black mist stones of the superdimensional realm were constantly exhausted and were forced to leave.

And Ye Tian also consumed a black mist stone, so he could only continue to use the black mist stone.

"One black mist stone can probably last for one extradimensional epoch time, and I can only cultivate ten extradimensional epoch time!"

Ye Tian really wanted to be here all the time, but if he didn't have enough (bcfd) black fog stones, he definitely wouldn't work.

"I don't know if I can let the copy body come in to cultivate, it's okay to hold on for a while, as long as the copy body enters enough times, I should be able to continue to comprehend!"

But this method doesn't work, and we have to try it in the future.

Before you know it, one extradimensional epoch after another has passed.

After ten extradimensional epochs had passed, his extradimensional rule realm had reached the realm of fifty-five thousand six hundred silks.

Don't look at the super-dimensional rule realm that has only improved by about 5,000 threads, but this is already a terrifying improvement.

Under normal circumstances, a second realm extradimensional realm, one black mist stone can help them improve a hundred threads of extradimensional rules here, even if it is ten black mist stones, it can also improve a thousand threads of extradimensional rules at most.

This is also because of their low realm, if their extra-dimensional rule realm is the same as Ye Tian's, then the ascension effect will be even lower.

Some powerful forces were able to get resources comparable to the multidimensional essence, which was enough for them to get a better promotion here.

Ye Tian was still too weak to imagine the foundation of those top extradimensional forces, so he naturally didn't feel that his ascension was the highest.

However, compared to most extradimensional realms, the benefits he could obtain here were naturally many.

"It's time to go!"

The Moon Realm Lord counted the time and reminded. []

"Good!"

Ye Tian left quickly, and soon after leaving, the power of the Black Mist Stone was exhausted.

......

Jellyfish world.

Ye Tian is back again, he is going to stay here for a few more days, and he is not in a hurry to leave.

At the same time, he prepares to condense the replica body.

And the process of condensing and copying the body naturally couldn't be perceived by the Lord of the Moon Realm, so he urged the Great Realm Armor Technique to ensure that the secret of condensing and copying the body was not revealed.

After all, he and the Moon Realm Lord were only cooperating, and their relationship was not very close.

Therefore, this secret must be hidden.

Soon, a copy of Ye Tian's body condensed, and then quickly left.

This replica body went to other places, and then condensed a replica body, and then went to the Black Mist Realm.

He was going to go to the Black Mist Realm again to see if he could stay in the Black Mist Stone Statue area for a few more days.

It didn't take long for him to arrive at the area of black fog where the Black Mist Stone Statue was located.

As soon as he entered, the protective wall formed by his extradimensional rules was directly shattered, and his flesh was poured in by countless black mist, which instantly turned into powder, dissipated and fell.

"What a terrifying black mist, I am a powerhouse of the second realm peak transcendent realm who has comprehended the rules of the transcendent dimension to more than one-fifth of the realm, and the result is instantaneous. No wonder that even if you can enter the third realm, you won't survive. "

Ye Tian also knew at this moment that it was pointless to continue to let other copy bodies in, he was killed in an instant, no matter how many copy bodies entered, it would be in vain, and he didn't even have time to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

......

"The Lord of the Moon Realm, if there is no Black Mist Stone, will he really not be able to survive for a long time on the side of the Black Mist Stone Statue?" Ye Tian asked.

"Without the Black Mist Stone, even the top-notch Second Realm Extradimensional Realm would not be able to survive for a moment. Moreover, that black mist ignored the defenses of many treasures and was almost impossible to resist. It is said that no matter how powerful the defensive treasure is, it will not be able to stay there for a long time. Besides, even if you come up with an unimaginable defensive treasure, it's not worth it to survive there for a while!"

"That's right, it's not worth it!"

Ye Tian nodded, but he still didn't want to give up!

After all, it would be a pity if such a public treasure land could not continue to be enlightened.

As for collecting the Black Mist Stone, he couldn't get it right now.

The Lord of the Shangyue Realm was in the third realm before, and he was able to get ten black mist stones, he was only in the second realm, and he was still an outsider, where was there a channel to get the black mist stones, so naturally he didn't expect this.

"Moon Realm Master, there is no secret technique that can allow an extradimensional realm to stay there for a long time!"

Ye Tian asked unwillingly.

At this time, the Moon Realm Lord seemed to remember something, and said, "It's not impossible, it is said that there is an innate multi-dimensional Dao body that can absorb the power of that black mist, and it should be able to stay there for a long time." "

"What is an innate multidimensional Dao body?"

Ye Tian heard about it for the first time, and he was very curious.
